title: DiscoverQOL
description: DiscoverQOL is a optimized and QOL modpack. Fabric
body:
## **No more updates** **Join DiscoverQOL to optimize your game and with QOL mods. You can play on servers since it's a client side modpack so you can play with optimized and with QOL mods.**
All the mods - [Advancement Plaques](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-plaques) by [Grend](https://modrinth.com/user/Grend). - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) by [squeek502](https://modrinth.com/user/squeek502). - [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) by [way2muchnoise](https://modrinth.com/user/way2muchnoise). - [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds) by [Motschen](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen). - [Better F1 Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-f1-reborn) by [MovTery](https://modrinth.com/user/MovTery). - [Better Ping Display [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) by [vladmarica](https://modrinth.com/user/vladmarica). - [Better Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-third-person) by [Socolio](https://modrinth.com/user/Socolio). - [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) by [TreyRuffy](https://modrinth.com/user/TreyRuffy). - [Blur+](https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-plus) by [Motschen](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen). - [Chat Animation [Smooth Chat]](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation) by [Ezzenix](https://modrinth.com/user/Ezzenix). - [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) by [dzwdz](https://modrinth.com/user/dzwdz). - [Client Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-tweaks) by [BlayTheNinth](https://modrinth.com/user/BlayTheNinth). - [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) by [jaredlll08](https://modrinth.com/user/jaredlll08). - [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) by [A5b84](https://modrinth.com/user/A5b84). - [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) by [isxander](https://modrinth.com/user/isxander). - [Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll) by [enjarai](https://modrinth.com/user/enjarai). - [Durability Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/durability-tooltip) by [SuperMartijn642](https://modrinth.com/user/SuperMartijn642). - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) by [juliand665](https://modrinth.com/user/juliand665). - [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) by [Darkhax](https://modrinth.com/user/Darkhax). - [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) by [FoundationGames](https://modrinth.com/user/FoundationGames). - [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw). - [Entity View Distance](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-view-distance) by [Patbox](https://modrinth.com/user/Patbox). - [Equipment Compare](https://modrinth.com/mod/equipment-compare) by [Grend](https://modrinth.com/user/Grend). - [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) by [randommcsomethin](https://modrinth.com/user/randommcsomethin). - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by [malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811). - [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw). - [Glowing Torchflower](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowing-torchflower) by [NikitaCartes](https://modrinth.com/user/NikitaCartes). - [GUI Followers](https://modrinth.com/mod/gui-followers) by [Serilum](https://modrinth.com/user/Serilum). - [Held Item Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/held-item-info) by [A5b84](https://modrinth.com/user/A5b84). - [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) by [RaphiMC](https://modrinth.com/user/RaphiMC). - [ImmersiveThunder](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersivethunder) by [netcatgirl](https://modrinth.com/user/netcatgirl). - [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) by [blackd](https://modrinth.com/user/blackd). - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot). - [Item Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-borders) by [Grend](https://modrinth.com/user/Grend). - [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) by [Snownee](https://modrinth.com/user/Snownee). - [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips) by [Grend](https://modrinth.com/user/Grend). - [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty) by [andi-makes](https://modrinth.com/user/andi-makes). - [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3). - [Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop) by [Tschipcraft](https://modrinth.com/user/Tschipcraft). - [Merchant Markers](https://modrinth.com/mod/merchant-markers) by [Grend](https://modrinth.com/user/Grend). - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by [Terraformers](https://modrinth.com/organization/terraformers). - [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) by [MehVahdJukaar](https://modrinth.com/user/MehVahdJukaar). - [Monsters in the Closet](https://modrinth.com/mod/monsters-in-the-closet) by [Minenash](https://modrinth.com/user/Minenash). - [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw). - [Overflowing Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars) by [Fuzs](https://modrinth.com/user/Fuzs). - [Pick Up Notifier](https://modrinth.com/mod/pick-up-notifier) by [Fuzs](https://modrinth.com/user/Fuzs). - [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) by [Sollace](https://modrinth.com/user/Sollace). - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese). - [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) by [dima_dencep](https://modrinth.com/user/dima_dencep). - [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) by [MisterPeModder](https://modrinth.com/user/MisterPeModder). - [Smooth Gui](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-gui) by [Ezzenix](https://modrinth.com/user/Ezzenix). - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3). - [Sodium Options Mod Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-options-mod-compat) by [Txni](https://modrinth.com/user/Txni). - [Sodium Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-dynamic-lights) by [Txni](https://modrinth.com/user/Txni). - [Sodium Extras](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extras) by [Txni](https://modrinth.com/user/Txni). - [Sodium Leaf Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodiumleafculling) by [Txni](https://modrinth.com/user/Txni). - [Spyglass Improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/spyglass-improvements) by [juancarloscp52](https://modrinth.com/user/juancarloscp52). - [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars) by [A5b84](https://modrinth.com/user/A5b84). - [Toggle Item Frames](https://modrinth.com/mod/toggle-item-frames) by [lamaprogramer](https://modrinth.com/user/lamaprogramer). - [ToolTipFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltipfix) by [kyrptonaught](https://modrinth.com/user/kyrptonaught). - [Vanilla Notebook](https://modrinth.com/mod/notebook) by [Juniper](https://modrinth.com/user/Juniper). - [Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) by [ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland). - [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) by [PinkGoosik](https://modrinth.com/user/PinkGoosik). - [Wakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wakes) by [Goby56](https://modrinth.com/user/Goby56). - [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw).
